name: Monocle
description: %1's monocle allows him to see all invisible units on the map.

name: Catastrophic
description: %1's catastrophic Hell Blast can wipe out entire army lines and is unique to her.

name: Bard
description: Being a bard, %1 is loved by all people and creatures around him. His songs inspire bravery which cause his creatures to regain 2 loyalty each round.

name: Luck
description: %1 possesses uncanny luck in the Rune Game. On each unforced turn draw, he sees two runes and keeps one; the other returns to the bottom of the wall. Directed draw spells take precedence.

name: Telepath
description: %1 is a telepath. This allows him to chose, pung, kong, game and cast spells even when silence has been cast.
